◎简　　介  

　　"The author of works on subjects as wide-ranging as Alfred Hitchcock, 9/11, opera, Christianity, Lenin and David Lynch, Slovenian philosopher Slavoj Zizek is one of the most important--and outrageous--cultural theorists working today.This captivating, erudite documentary explores the eccentric personality and esoteric work of this incomparable academic and writer who has been ...
